draft.description: Draft a message. Replace cli_canary_PLACEHOLDER with a real bot id from `beam bots list`. The preview is shown to the human approver; content is the full message to send.
draft.prompt: Draft a short announcement message. Return JSON: {"preview": string, "content": string}. Preview should be <200 chars; content is the full message to send.

send.description: Send the drafted message after human approval. The humanGate shows draft.output.preview on the approval card; clicking Approve sends draft.output.content to the target chat. This is the safe-by-default pattern: every side-effect executor carries its own humanGate.
